title: Zoom On Hover

statement.markdown:
## Description: Create an animation that zooms an image when hovered over.
### Requirements
Use Tailwind CSS for styling.
The image should zoom from a scale of 1 to 2 when hovered over.
The image should return to its original size when the hover is removed.
Use JavaScript to add the hover event listener to the image.

constraints: Use HTML to create the image and container.
Use CSS to style the image and add the animation.
Use JavaScript to add the event listener and animate the image.

gradingCriteria.description: Image returns to original size when hover is removed
JavaScript is used to add the hover event listener
